title: Cobweb Outlines
description: Makes cobwebs have a block outline for better visibility.
body:
## Showcase
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Wd2XBm0Z/images/cdedd82107d1b1233b41e24e4a6606c6a964fb3e.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Wd2XBm0Z/images/a9326d7313f5ffcc672065d74775314963ccf7fd.png)
See the "How to Use" section below for picking your preferred version of the pack.

## Description
This is a texture pack that adds an outline to the cobweb model. This makes it seem more like a full block, which makes it easier and more intuitive to place things on it or avoid it. 

There are two versions of the pack. The first one is to get [thin outlines](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/web/version/1.0.2) around the cobweb, and the second one is to get [thick, blocky outlines](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/web/version/1.0.1).

I originally made this for the UHC gamemode on [mctiers](https://mctiers.com), since it makes it way easier to know the actual cobweb hitbox in order to place lava or water on it. As mentioned before, it also makes it a lot easier to avoid getting into, since before you might completely miss the cobwebs and still get into it since the original Minecraft model doesn't accurately represent the hitbox.

## How to Use
1. Choose your preferred version of the pack. You can either download [Thin Outlines](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/web/version/1.0.2) or [Thick Outlines](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/web/version/1.0.1).
2. After downloading, put it in your `%APPDATA%/.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder. Then, you can apply it ingame. Alternatively, you can drag the downloaded folder into the resourcepacks screen ingame.
3. After applying the pack, your cobwebs should immediately be changed.

## Support
**Join [My Discord](https://discord.gg/gymTft2GbV)**
   - Report bugs
   - Create suggestions
   - Vote on future packs
   - Interact with the community
   - Ask for help with texture packs
   - This is the place to ask if you can use this pack in your own pack

**Check out [The Repository](https://github.com/AlphaLeoli/Texture-Packs)**
   - Report bugs
   - Create suggestions
   - Contribute by creating a pull request

https://www.alphaleo.li/resourcepacks
